modes.name: Obby
modes.description: Classic obstacle course mode with checkpoints and platforms. Players complete a parkour-style map from start to finish.

modes.name: Jump or Die
modes.description: Arena mode where red kill blocks appear and disappear. Players must constantly move, jump and avoid touching them. Touching a red block eliminates the player.

modes.name: Brick Drop
modes.description: Survival last-man-standing mode. Players walk on a platform made of blocks. When a player steps on a block, it disappears. Last player alive wins.

places.name: Disco Room
places.description: Social chill area in the lobby with music and lights. Not a game mode.

update_history.name: Fix Update
update_history.description: Mini Games was heavily fixed and improved.

update_history.name: Sonic Event
update_history.description: Temporary Sonic-style Obby mode was added.

update_history.name: Jump or Die Update
update_history.description: Added the Jump or Die mode.

update_history.name: Christmas Event
update_history.description: The entire Mini Games map received a Christmas theme.
